LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. DEFENDANT LOIS WOODWORTH'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 9, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, TO ALLOW TIME FOR THE COURT AND OPPOSING COUNSEL TO RECEIVE AND REVIEW PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION, WHICH PLAINTIFF CLAIMS WAS MAILED ON OCTOBER 19, 2012. (COURT SIGNED ORDER ALLOWNG PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR TELEPHONICALLY ON NOV. 9, 2012.) JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ORDER ORDER GRANTING PERMISSION FOR WAYNE W. SMITH TO APPEAR TELEPHONICALLY AT OCTOBER 26, 2012 HEARING

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LOIS WOODWORTH'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON PLEADINGS IS GRANTED FOR 2 REASONS: 1) CLAIM PRESENTED IS NOT SUFFICIENT TO BRING A LAW SUIT. GOVERNMENT CLAIM SHOULD BE FILED IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO 2) TIME HAS ALREADY PASSED TO FILE LATE CLAIM. PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS ACCORDINGLY DISMISSED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BUT WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO THE REFILING OF THE FEDERAL CLAIM IN THE EVENT THAT PLAINTIFF'S CONVICTION IS OVERTURNED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - WAYNE W. SMITH, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. KIMBERLY A. BLISS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT LOIS WOODWORTH'S Motion For Judgment On Pleadings is granted for 2 reasons: 1) Claim presented is not sufficient to bring a law suit. Government Claim should be filed in the City and County of San Francisco 2) time has already passed to file late claim. PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS ACCORDINGLY DISMISSED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BUT WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO THE REFILING OF THE FEDERAL CLAIM IN THE EVENT THAT PLAINTIFF'S CONVICTION IS OVERTURNED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/MJM

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-26-2012 Continued To Nov-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kimberly A. Bliss, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3861, for defendant and moving party;
Wayne Smith, plaintiff, appearing on his own behalf by phone.

The matter was discussed. DEFENDANT LOIS WOODWORTH'S Motion For Judgment On Pleadings is continued to November 9, 2012 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302, to allow time for the court and opposing counsel to receive and review Plaintiff's opposition, which Plaintiff claims was mailed on October 19, 2012. (Court signed order allowng plaintiff to appear telephonically on Nov. 9, 2012.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Pleadings
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Continued To Oct-26-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Wayne Smith, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf via courtcall;
Kimberly A. Bliss, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3861, for Defendant and moving party.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, DEFENDANT LOIS WOODWORTH'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to October 26, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 302 to give the plaintiff sufficient time to file an opposition. Opposition is due by Oct. 12; Reply is due by Oct. 19. The court signed an order permitting plaintiff to appear telephonically at the hearing. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
